tools_used: CourtListener MCP search and endpoint access
helpful: The provisioned snapshot exposed conference posture and response waivers.
The statpack supplied calibrated modern-cert signal cuts.
CourtListener MCP identified the underlying district docket and nature of suit.
gaps: Reliable CourtListener docket-entry capacity during a prediction cell
notes: The corpus query transferred about 108 MiB for five compact priors, while the filed petition had no text layer. OCR would have added substantially more value than broad prior retrieval in this cell.
